codeReview.summary: The bridge code now covers the requested entity families in src/io/native_bridge.rs, but the claimed feature commit does not actually contain those code changes. Commit 11579d20 only updates .factory/services.yaml, so the reported implementation evidence does not match the reviewed commit and the feature is not reviewable as a completed, attributable change.

issues.description: The handoff attributes this feature to commit 11579d20f655a7713823cf86ca37770006efc7f3, but that commit only changes the test command in .factory/services.yaml and does not include any bridge implementation or tests for LEADER/MLINE/TOLERANCE, IMAGE/WIPEOUT, ATTDEF/ATTRIB/PdfUnderlay/Unknown, or Solid3D/Region. Because the reviewed commit lacks the feature code entirely, there is no attributable implementation to approve for this feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker correctly deviated from the stale bridge test command in services.yaml. The mission manifest had cargo test --lib native_bridge -- --test-threads=16, but the root package has no library target; the actual working command is cargo test --bin H7CAD native_bridge -- --test-threads=16.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml:7 still recorded the invalid --lib form during the first worker run, and the transcript/handoff for session ca2df13c-7fd4-49ce-b4a9-a3abf3074c8e documents the resulting failure plus the working --bin H7CAD replacement. Commit 11579d20 then changes only this command.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The dxf-bridge-worker skill tells workers to run broader validation from services.yaml, but it does not mention how to proceed when the manifest command is stale for the current workspace layout. That gap forced an ad hoc deviation and contributed to the confusing handoff/commit mismatch for this feature.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: D:/work/plant-code/cad/H7CAD/.factory/skills/dxf-bridge-worker/SKILL.md directs workers to use services.yaml validation commands verbatim, while the first worker handoff records a deviation because cargo test --lib native_bridge is invalid in this repo.

summary: Review failed: the repository's current native_bridge.rs contains the expected bridge mappings and tests, but the commit recorded for this feature (11579d20) only fixes the test command in services.yaml. Since the reported implementation is not present in the reviewed commit, the feature lacks attributable evidence and cannot be approved as completed.
